title: MES reference deploy (UI)
description: Golden MES install from Solutions/Marketplace into Operator. Paid marketplace SKU may block demostand; free mes-platform-production is an accepted substitute for UI walkthrough.
prompt: Install the mes-reference application from Solutions/Marketplace, open its operator shell, and confirm BFF-backed order screens load for an operator.
uiJourney: Admin → System → Solutions → Install mes-reference (or mes-platform-production) → Operator → Work Queue
humanSteps: Sign in as admin; open System → Solutions (Решения) and locate mes-reference (or free mes-platform-production if paid listing is blocked).
Deploy/import the full bundle (not a catalog stub); wait until status is ready and operatorUi is configured.
Open /?mode=operator&app=mes-reference (or mes-platform-production) and confirm order/list screens render.
Open Work Queue app or sidebar and confirm tasks surface for the MES app.
